title: Titoo
desc: Titoo and his society accidentally lose control of the hot air balloon, leading them on a wild ride where they must work together to safely land and avoid crashing into thr trees below.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo’s parents come across a magical clock which takes them back in time and makes them younger. Later, the kids strive to get their parents back to normal.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo's captaincy for the International Hockey Championship sparks Shera's jealousy. As a result, Shera refuses to support the team's quest for victory.

title: Titoo
desc: When Password bhai and his gang of con artists hatch a scheme to rob the town's bank, Titoo decides to stop them from succeeding.

title: Titoo
desc: To evade trouble at school, Titoo hires an actor to impersonate his grandfather. However, Shera uncovers his plan and tries to expose his deception.

title: Titoo
desc: Concerned about his father's well-being, Titoo undertakes a mission to improve his lifestyle and encourages him to adapt to healthier habits.

title: Titoo
desc: Upon learning of the society watchman's urgent need to visit his village, Titoo leaps into action and helps him make his journey in time.

title: Titoo
desc: Istri Uncle's laundry business struggles to remain open. As a result, Titoo and Shera collaborate on a plan to revitalise the shop and keep him in town.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo, an inspiring eight-year-old boy, wishes to help everyone in need. However, his attempts only get him into trouble.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo, an inspiring eight-year-old boy, wishes to help everyone in need. However, his attempts only get him into trouble.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo tries to capture scientist Uncle's microbes in a test tube when they expanded to enormous proportions and wreaked havoc in the community.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo wants to go on an adventure trip and asks his mother's permission for the same. However, soon Titoo lands inside a video game.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo's kindness to an elderly woman backfires, leaving him giftless for Ganna's birthday. As a result, he scrambles to find a solution.

title: Titoo
desc: When the building secretary participates in a game of cricket with Titoo, he suffers an accident which leaves him amnesiac.

title: Titoo
desc: After breaking their father's laptop, Golu and Titoo scramble to mend it. However, trouble arises when they realise about the lack of money for the repair.

title: Titoo
desc: At the aquarium waterpark, a jealous Shera isolates Titoo with rumours. Later, Titoo heroically rescues his friends from a perilous shark encounter.

title: Titoo
desc: A parking row between Titoo's father and the Secretary splits the neighborhood into opposing camps. Titoo and his friends attempt to talk sense into the feuding elders and restore peace.

title: Titoo
desc: Disaster strikes as Titoo, fast asleep in his family's car, becomes an unwitting passenger in a theft. Upon waking to the shocking situation, he formulates a clever strategy to outwit the car thieves.

title: Titoo
desc: After Titoo's father falls ill from inhaling toxic fumes at work, Titoo and Golu must take over his responsibilities, but it proves rather difficult.

title: Titoo
desc: Shera and Titoo's friendly bet turns chaotic during a parents' sports day when their rivalry heats up as the competition unfolds.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo's neighbours face eviction by a cunning group of swindlers. However, Titoo successfully drives them away using his experimental hair oil.

title: Titoo
desc: During the school's annual play, Shera hatches a devious plan to sabotage Golu's performance and ruin his reputation on stage.

title: Titoo
desc: Inspired by an advertisement, Titoo and Golu plan a giant pizza feast for their neighbourhood. However, Shera decides to sabotage their efforts.

title: Titoo
desc: Shera's jealousy leads to a spooky prank on Titoo in a haunted house. However, when Titoo discovers the truth, he plots revenge.

title: Titoo
desc: Chacha's mismanagement of Gupta Ji's shop leads to chaos. However, Titoo steps in to rectify the situation and save the day.

title: Titoo
desc: After his father tasks him with cleaning duty of the house, Titoo fabricates a clever plan to motivate the people of the town to help him.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo rescues an injured pigeon, but his parents decline to keep it. As a result, he rallies the town to care for the bird's health.

title: Titoo
desc: Titoo frets over his poor marks and hatches a scheme to hide it from his parents. However, Shera decides to expose Titoo's report card.

title: Titoo
desc: Troubled by his parents' misguided efforts to copy another child's daily routine, Titoo uses his clever antics to derail their plan.

desc: Upon feeling neglected, Golu stages his own kidnapping. Subsequently, when his parents begin to panic, Titoo takes charge to find Golu.

desc: Three former students with a grudge take the teachers captive and begin to punish them in front of students. Titoo sets them off running and saves the teachers.

desc: Choocha wins a parrot named Miyan Mitthu in a bet, but the parrot ends up causing trouble for the gang.

title: Fukrey Boyzzz
desc: Based on Choocha's dream, Hunny predicts that Choocha will be a great chef for the day. The boys manage Billu's shop for the day.

title: Fukrey Boyzzz
desc: Choocha, Hunny and Laali chase their bold and lofty aspirations. However, they find themselves competing with the ruthless Bholi Punjaban, who relentlessly plots to thwart their progress.

title: Smaashhing Simmba
desc: Upon uncovering Michael Money's fraudulent wishing well scam, Simmba and Ricky promptly launch into action to expose the con.

title: Smaashhing Simmba
desc: The mayor puts out a huge reward in exchange for the capture of the thief Sunday Monday. So when Simmba and friends learn of this, they devise a plan to catch him.

title: Smaashhing Simmba
desc: Lambu Bouna sneakily pickpockets Pillu Kaka of his wallet. But Simmba notices him thieving and tries to stop him from escaping.

title: Smaashhing Simmba
desc: When Simmba and his friends catch wind of High-tech Hunter's scheme to rob the city museum, they devise their own plan to catch him red handed.

title: Smaashhing Simmba
desc: When Dheemi Raftaar steals Simmba's bicycle, he sets out to find him and retrieve his stolen bicycle while teaching Dheemi Raftaar a lesson.

title: Kris Roll No 21
desc: Fed up with their mischief, Kanishk warns the kids about the detention room. Meanwhile, Dr J shares his evil idea of using the room to do away with Kris.

desc: Kanishk accidently gets hit on the head and wakes up with the power to hear other people's thoughts. But when this causes trouble for his staff, they come up with a plan to get rid of his power.

desc: After Kanishk and Dr J unearth a mystical lamp in the desert, they invoke the wicked genie, Jintu, to seek his help destroying Kris for once and for all.
